name: The Official 42 Coin
description: The Official 42 Coin ($42) is a community-driven memecoin on Solana celebrating the legendary answer to life, the universe, and everything — inspired by Douglas Adams' iconic "The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy." After the original developer abandoned ship, a passionate community of believers initiated a full CTO (Community Takeover), building new branding, social channels, and a thriving ecosystem from scratch. 42 isn't just a number — it's a movement. With a fresh identity, dedicated holders, and cosmic ambitions, the 42 community is on a mission to blast this token into immortality. No VC backing. No empty promises. Just pure meme magic, community power, and the ultimate answer. Don't panic — just hold 42.
